name: Chicken Casserole, Lone Star
recipeIngredient: 2 Chickens, breasts, thighs, and drumsticks from both
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, salt, pepper, and ginger together.
2. Dredge chicken pieces in the seasoned flour mixture.
3. Brown the floured chicken in a skillet with 4 tablespoons melted margarine. Remove when brown and set aside, saving drippings.
4. Add chicken pieces to a large casserole dish.
5. Mix flour into the drippings, forming a paste.
6. Stir in water, beef bouillon, catsup, Worcestershire sauce, bay leaves, and whole onions.
7. Pour over the chicken.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
9. Add potatoes, carrots, and mushrooms; bake an additional 35 minutes.
10. Add peas and bake for 10 more minutes. SERVES 6
